creator: christophe.cap@telenet.be
text:
Hi,

Could it be that this problem is not to be fixed in RELENG_6_2  ?

Although this bug seems flagged wit priority low and severity non-criticil, 
for me it's rather critical, on my second SATA driver all my home-folders 
reside.

In the meantime I stepped back to the 6.1 release.

I've attached dmesg and pciconf logs for both the 6.1 and 6.2 version on my 
machine.

Kind regards,

Christophe.

NOTE. I already posted this on nabble forums, but got no reply of good 
acceptance , hence this mail.
